'''''Inexorable''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWvTF" />

==History==
The ''Inexorable'' came to the aid of the Imperial space factory ''[[Drekker]]'', where it deployed [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] of [[Gamma Squadron (Inexorable)|Gamma]] and [[Beta Squadron (Inexorable)|Beta Squadrons]], respectively, to [[Battle of Yerej|defend]] against a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] raid.<ref name="XWvTF" />

The ''Inexorable'' was present in the [[Zhar system]] but was not able to prevent [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen's]] ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rebel fighters]] to [[Mission to Zhar|steal]] the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']].<ref name="XWA" />
{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While the occurrence of the space battle depicted in this mission, as well as the participants, is [[Canon]], the outcome depends on the actions of the player and is therefore indeterminate. For lack of other canonical information, it should be assumed that no lasting effect (such as the destruction of the station ''Drekker'' or a starship) resulted from the battle.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
